title: MTBF/MTTR Financial Impact Calculator
description: Calculates the financial impact of equipment reliability (MTBF) and maintainability (MTTR) based on industrial engineering standards (ISO 14224, ISO 55000, Six Sigma, Lean).

inputs.label: Operating Hours per Year
inputs.businessContext: Total planned operating hours of the equipment per year. Used to calculate failure frequency and downtime.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total planned operating hours of the equipment per year. Used to calculate failure frequency and downtime.

inputs.label: Number of Units
inputs.businessContext: Total number of identical or similar assets in the fleet.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of identical or similar assets in the fleet.

inputs.label: Mean Time Between Failures (MTBF)
inputs.businessContext: Average time between failures for a repairable system. Higher is better. ISO 14224.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average time between failures for a repairable system. Higher is better. ISO 14224.

inputs.label: Mean Time To Repair (MTTR)
inputs.businessContext: Average time to restore a failed system to operational state. Lower is better. Includes diagnosis, repair, testing.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average time to restore a failed system to operational state. Lower is better. Includes diagnosis, repair, testing.

inputs.label: Cost per Downtime Hour
inputs.businessContext: Lost profit or cost incurred per hour of equipment downtime (lost production, labor, penalties).

businessContext_i18n.en: Lost profit or cost incurred per hour of equipment downtime (lost production, labor, penalties).

inputs.label: Cost per Failure Event (excluding downtime)
inputs.businessContext: Fixed costs per failure: spare parts, logistics, contractor fees, administrative overhead.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fixed costs per failure: spare parts, logistics, contractor fees, administrative overhead.

inputs.label: Maintenance Labor Rate
inputs.businessContext: Hourly cost of maintenance personnel (including overhead).

businessContext_i18n.en: Hourly cost of maintenance personnel (including overhead).

inputs.label: Reliability Improvement Investment (annual)
inputs.businessContext: Annual budget allocated to reliability improvement projects (training, redesign, predictive maintenance).

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual budget allocated to reliability improvement projects (training, redesign, predictive maintenance).

rules.message: MTBF and MTTR must be positive numbers.
Current availability is below target. Consider improving MTBF or reducing MTTR.

thresholds.alert: Availability is critically low. Immediate action recommended.
Annual downtime cost exceeds $100k. Consider reliability improvement.
MTBF is below industry benchmark. Investigate root causes.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
